## Definition of Done (docs/SDLC.md §4)

- [ ] Failing test written and observed failing before implementation
- [ ] `just test` green locally; clippy clean; no new warnings
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME/placeholder/commented-out code
- [ ] Plan checkbox(es) ticked in this PR; affected docs updated in this PR
- [ ] Nothing in `apple/generated/` committed or hand-edited
